summary: Use current live session as third eval fixture — captures post-instruction-fix behavior for A/B comparison
context: After commit 4268312 strengthened plugin instructions (SessionStart hook prompts for twining_assemble, decide skill requires link_commit, adds blind-decisions warning), we need a new fixture from a session running with the updated plugin to measure whether scores improve. The current session (a6821693) is the first session after that commit.
rationale: Using the live session transcript captures real dogfooding behavior with the updated instructions. Adding it as a third 'good' fixture provides an A/B comparison: session-good-workflow (pre-fix) vs this session (post-fix). The scrub script already handles in-progress JSONL files correctly since it processes line-by-line. Three fixtures (2 good, 1 poor) give better signal than two.

alternatives.option: Wait for a separate dedicated dogfood session
pros: Full session from start to finish
cons: No guarantee that session would be richer
alternatives.reason_rejected: Adds delay with no benefit — this session already has rich Twining usage and runs with updated plugin

cons: Cannot show improvement from instruction changes
alternatives.reason_rejected: That session started before commit 4268312, so it used old plugin instructions — defeats the purpose of measuring instruction improvements
